facebook.caption: Tourists walk straight past this place on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Their loss. Bagels 'n Eggs is pulling a 4.8 out of 639 reviews and the breakfast crowd here is mostly expats and regulars, not resort guests. Real bagels. Actual eggs done right. In Phu Quoc. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
